data.title: Bitcoin Flash Crash Wipes Out $100B in Crypto Market Value
data.description:
Bitcoin suffered a sudden flash crash on Sunday after a whale sold 24,000 BTC worth $2.7 billion. The sell-off triggered $550 million in liquidations and briefly erased $100 billion from the crypto market before a partial recovery.

The post Bitcoin Flash Crash Wipes Out $100B in Crypto Market Value appeared first on Traders Log.

data.title: Nebius Group Soars After $17.4 Billion Microsoft AI Deal
data.description:
Nebius Group shares soared more than 50% after striking a $17.4 billion deal to supply Microsoft with GPU-based AI infrastructure, marking the company’s biggest partnership and a major step in its global expansion.

The post Nebius Group Soars After $17.4 Billion Microsoft AI Deal appeared first on Traders Log.

data.title: Silver Rallies to Fresh 14-Year Highs
data.description:
Silver surged sharply today, pushing to levels not seen since May 2011. The white metal broke past key resistance, reaching fresh multi-year highs amid bullish momentum and rising investor interest.

The post Silver Rallies to Fresh 14-Year Highs appeared first on Traders Log.

data.title: Robinhood Rockets to New Heights
data.description:
Robinhood shares surged to record highs today, fueled by booming prediction markets, S&P 500 inclusion, and strong investor demand — though risks around valuation, volatility, and regulation remain in focus.

The post Robinhood Rockets to New Heights appeared first on Traders Log.

data.title: Tether Joins Team Juventus: When Crypto Meets the Beautiful Game
data.description:
Tether, the company behind USDT, has become a major shareholder in Juventus, aiming to blend blockchain innovation with football tradition while seeking a stronger role in the club’s governance and future.

The post Tether Joins Team Juventus: When Crypto Meets the Beautiful Game appeared first on Traders Log.

data.title: Edgeful Review: The Tool Bringing Institutional-Grade Market Research to Retail Traders
data.description:
Edgeful is a statistics-based trading platform that positions itself as a personal financial analyst, transforming raw market data into actionable insights for traders. Rather than relying on intuition, Edgeful provides probability-based strategies backed by historical data analysis.

The post Edgeful Review: The Tool Bringing Institutional-Grade Market Research to Retail Traders appeared first on Traders Log.
